commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a Slack channel subagent completion regression test for `visibleReplies: "automatic"` and keeps the message-tool-only guard test beside it.

Reproducibility: no. I do not have a failing current-main repro: current source already routes text-only group/channel completions through the shared completion policy and defaults automatic replies to visible final delivery; the PR adds a regression shape rather than a production repro.
